name: Sweet Potato Casserole (Microwave)
recipeIngredient: 4 tablespoons dark brown sugar, firmly packed
1 and 1/2 cups miniature marshmallows, butter or margarine
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the potatoes and discard the liquid. Drain the pineapple and set it aside with the juice.
2. In a small, heat-resistant, non-metallic bowl, melt butter in the microwave for 30 seconds.
3. Place the potatoes in a medium-sized bowl and mash them using a potato masher or fork.
4. Add the melted butter and brown sugar. Stir until well combined.
5. Add the pineapple juice until the desired consistency is reached. Fold in the pineapple tidings and marshmallows.
6. Butter a shallow, 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole dish and spoon the potato mixture into it.
7. Heat, uncovered, in the microwave for 5 to 6 minutes or until the potato mixture is heated through and the marshmallows begin to melt.
